info.title: Nr.31 FKR API
info.description: This is the backend for Nr.31 FKR site.

tags.name: Roster
tags.description: Endpoints for roster management: event types and unit types

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: Endpoints for user authentication and token management

get.description: Retrieves a specific unit type by ID

delete.description: Deletes a unit type by ID

get.description: Retrieves a specific event type by ID

delete.description: Deletes an event type by ID

put.description: Updates an existing calendar event by ID

400.description: Invalid request body or path parameter

delete.description: Deletes a calendar event by ID

get.description: Retrieves an application configuration by key

put.description: Updates or creates an application configuration

post.description: Uploads a file and stores its metadata. Allowed types: image/png, image/jpeg, image/webp. Max size: 5MB.

400.description: Invalid file (empty, wrong type, or too large)

get.description: Retrieves a list of calendar events for a specific date range

post.description: Generates a new JWT access token using a valid refresh token
Validates user credentials and returns JWT access and refresh tokens

get.description: Retrieves a list of all supported locales
Retrieves the nearest calendar event to a provided datetime
Retrieves the content of a specific log file
Retrieves a list of available application log files
Retrieves the current status of the Discord bot
Retrieves all application configurations with pagination

delete.description: Deletes a file and its metadata by UUID

UnitTypeRequest.description: Request representation for a unit type

customIcon.description: Custom icon associated with this unit type

UnitTypeDTO.description: DTO representing a participating military unit

id.description: Unique identifier of the unit type

name.description: Localized name of the unit type

description.description: Localized description of the unit type

customIcon.description: Custom icon associated with this unit type

EventTypeRequest.description: Request representation for an event type

customIcon.description: Custom icon associated with this event type

EventTypeDTO.description: DTO representing a type of calendar event

id.description: Unique identifier of the event type

name.description: Localized name of the event type

customIcon.description: Custom icon associated with this event type

Recurrence.description: Recurrence rules for a calendar event

until.description: End date of recurrence in ISO-8601 format

byDay.description: Days of the week for recurrence

UpdateEventRequest.description: Request representation for updating an existing calendar event

mode.description: Action mode specifying how to apply updates to recurring events

start.description: Start time of the event in ISO-8601 format

end.description: End time of the event in ISO-8601 format

originalStart.description: Original start time of the event, required for updating single instances of recurring events

serverName.description: Name of the server where the event takes place

participatingUnits.description: List of unit identifiers participating in the event

CalendarEventDTO.description: Data transfer object representing a calendar event

seriesId.description: Identifier for the series of recurring events

start.description: Start time of the event in ISO-8601 format

end.description: End time of the event in ISO-8601 format

serverName.description: Name of the server where the event takes place

participatingUnits.description: List of units participating in the event

source.description: Source of the event (SITE or DISCORD)

discordId.description: Discord Scheduled Event ID if the event is synced from Discord

configValue.description: The actual configuration value as a JSON object, validated by schema

configSchema.description: JSON schema used to validate the configValue

CreateEventRequest.description: Request representation for creating a new calendar event

start.description: Start time of the event in ISO-8601 format

end.description: End time of the event in ISO-8601 format

serverName.description: Name of the server where the event takes place

participatingUnits.description: List of unit identifiers participating in the event

RefreshTokenRequest.description: Request object for refreshing access tokens

refreshToken.description: Refresh token used to obtain new access tokens

LogoutRequest.description: Request object for logging out and invalidating refresh tokens

LogFilesListResponse.description: Response object containing list of available log files

DiscordBotStatusResponse.description: Response object containing discord bot status
